---
title: "Javier Enrique Aguilar"
subtitle: "Doctoral researcher in Statistics"
#comments: false
from: markdown+emoji
image: graphics/me.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope-fill
      href: mailto:javier.aguilarr@icloud.com
    - text: Github
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/jear2412
    - text: Google Scholar
      aria-label: google-scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ysOrxQUAAAAJ&hl=en
    
format:
  html: 
    page-layout: full
aliases:
  - /about
---

:::{#about-heading}


I am a doctoral researcher at the [Cluster of Excellence SimTech](https://www.simtech.uni-stuttgart.de) at the University of Stuttgart and a research assistant at [TU Dortmund](https://compstat.statistik.tu-dortmund.de/en/), working with [Paul Bürkner](https://paul-buerkner.github.io). I have a Master's degree in Probability and Statistics from the Center for Research in Mathematics [CIMAT](https://ppe.cimat.mx) in Guanajuato, Mexico, where I was supervised by [Andrés Christen](https://www.cimat.mx/~jac/).

My main research interests are Bayesian Inference, Bayesian Computation, Prior Specification, Probabilistic Programming, and High-Dimensional Statistics.

Feel free to [reach out](mailto:javier.aguilarr@icloud.com) if you’re interested in collaborating or have any questions or comments about my work.

:::
